---
tags: [索引, auto-generated]
created: <% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>
type: folder-index
---

# 📁 <% tp.file.title %>

> 返回 [[🏠 知识库首页]] | 上级：`<% tp.file.folder(true) %>`

---

## 📋 文件清单

```dataview
TABLE file.ctime as "创建时间", file.size as "大小", file.tags as "标签
FROM "<% tp.file.folder(true) %>"
WHERE file.name != this.file.name AND file.extension = "md"
SORT file.name
```

## 📎 非Markdown文件（PDF/DOC/XLS/DWG）

```dataview
TABLE file.ctime as "创建时间", file.size as "大小"
FROM "<% tp.file.folder(true) %>"
WHERE file.extension != "md"
SORT file.extension, file.name
```

## 🔗 反向链接（谁引用了本目录）

```dataview
LIST
FROM ""
WHERE contains(file.outlinks, this.file.inlinks)
LIMIT 20
```

## 🏷️ 标签分布

```dataview
TABLE length(rows) as "数量"
FROM "<% tp.file.folder(true) %>"
WHERE file.tags
FLATTEN file.tags as tag
GROUP BY tag
SORT length(rows) DESC
```
